sentences.target: Ich verkaufe meinen alten Schmuck online.

translations.de: Ich verkaufe meinen alten Schmuck online.
translations.en: I'm selling my old jewelry online.
translations.es: Estoy vendiendo mis joyas antiguas por internet.
translations.fr: Je vends mes bijoux anciens en ligne.
translations.it: Vendo i miei vecchi gioielli online.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在网上卖我的旧首饰。
translations.yue: 我喺網上賣我嘅舊首飾。
translations.ru: Я продаю свои старые украшения в интернете.
translations.pt: Estou vendendo minhas jóias antigas na internet.
translations.he: אני מוכר את התכשיטים הישנים שלי באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Tôi đang bán đồ trang sức cũ của mình trên mạng.
translations.nl: Ik verkoop mijn oude sieraden online.
translations.uk: Я продаю свої старі прикраси в інтернеті.
translations.hu: A régi ékszereimet online adom el.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी पुरानी ज्वेलरी ऑनलाइन बेच रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Sprzedaję swoją starą biżuterię w internecie.
translations.el: Πουλάω τα παλιά μου κοσμήματα στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Jeg selger de gamle smykkene mine på nett.
translations.id: Saya menjual perhiasan lama saya secara online.
translations.sv: Jag säljer mina gamla smycken på nätet.
translations.cs: Prodávám své staré šperky na internetu.
translations.da: Jeg sælger mine gamle smykker på nettet.
translations.ja: 古いアクセサリーをネットで売っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive predicate taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with a masculine accusative singular noun (Schmuck); attributes possession.
Attributive adjective modifying Schmuck; masculine accusative singular form.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object in the accusative case of the verb 'verkaufe'.
Adverb of manner/medium modifying the verb; indicates where/how the selling occurs.

sentences.target: Sie hat den Schmuck ihrer Oma geerbt.
sentences.reading: /ziː hat deːn ʃmʊk ˈiːʁɐ ˈoːma ɡəˈɛʁpt/

translations.de: Sie hat den Schmuck ihrer Oma geerbt.
translations.ipa: /ziː hat deːn ʃmʊk ˈiːʁɐ ˈoːma ɡəˈɛʁpt/
translations.es: Ella heredó las joyas de su abuela.
translations.fr: Elle a hérité des bijoux de sa grand-mère.
translations.it: Ha ereditato i gioielli di sua nonna.
translations.pt: Ela herdou as jóias da avó.
translations.he: היא ירשה את התכשיטים של סבתה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy thừa hưởng trang sức của bà.
translations.nl: Ze erfde de sieraden van haar oma.
translations.hi: उसने अपनी दादी के गहने विरासत में पाए।
translations.el: Κληρονόμησε τα κοσμήματα της γιαγιάς της.
translations.ja: 彼女は祖母のアクセサリーを受け継ぎました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun used as subject; morphologically 3rd person singular feminine nominative (also ambiguous with formal 'Sie'); agrees with finite verb 'hat'.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; forms the perfect tense together with the past participle 'geerbt'.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Schmuck'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object in the accusative case.
Possessive determiner, genitive feminine singular; modifies 'Oma' to express the possessor of 'Schmuck' (i.e., 'of her grandma').
Common noun, feminine singular; genitive dependent within the noun phrase 'den Schmuck ihrer Oma'.
Past participle (Partizip II) of 'erben'; lexical verb in a perfect construction with auxiliary 'hat'.

sentences.target: Ich reinige den Schmuck nach dem Essen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁaɪ̯nɪɡə deːn ʃmʊk naːx deːm ˈɛsn̩/

translations.de: Ich reinige den Schmuck nach dem Essen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁaɪ̯nɪɡə deːn ʃmʊk naːx deːm ˈɛsn̩/
translations.en: I'll clean the jewelry after dinner.
translations.es: Voy a limpiar las joyas después de cenar.
translations.fr: Je nettoierai les bijoux après le dîner.
translations.zh-Hans: 我晚饭后会把首饰擦干净。
translations.yue: 我食完晚飯會抹乾淨啲首飾。
translations.pt: Vou limpar as jóias depois do jantar.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ lau sạch trang sức sau bữa tối.
translations.nl: Ik maak de sieraden schoon na het avondeten.
translations.hi: मैं रात के खाने के बाद गहनों को साफ करूँगा।
translations.el: Θα καθαρίσω τα κοσμήματα μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Jeg skal rengjøre smykkene etter middag.
translations.id: Saya akan membersihkan perhiasan setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Jag ska rengöra smyckena efter middagen.
translations.da: Jeg vil rengøre smykkerne efter aftensmad.
translations.ja: 夕食のあとにアクセサリーを磨きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive predicate taking a direct object.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Schmuck'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object in the accusative case.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Essen' governed by 'nach'.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'nach' in the dative; functions as a temporal complement.

sentences.target: Im Safe liegt der teure Schmuck.

translations.de: Im Safe liegt der teure Schmuck.
translations.en: The expensive jewelry is in the safe.
translations.es: Las joyas caras están en la caja fuerte.
translations.fr: Les bijoux chers sont dans le coffre-fort.
translations.it: I gioielli costosi sono nella cassaforte.
translations.zh-Hans: 昂贵的首饰在保险箱里。
translations.yue: 昂貴嘅首飾喺夾萬入面。
translations.pt: As jóias caras estão no cofre.
translations.vi: Trang sức đắt tiền ở trong két sắt.
translations.nl: De dure sieraden liggen in de kluis.
translations.hu: A drága ékszerek a széfben vannak.
translations.el: Τα ακριβά κοσμήματα είναι στο χρηματοκιβώτιο.
translations.nb: De dyre smykkene ligger i safen.
translations.sv: De dyra smyckena ligger i värdeskåpet.
translations.da: De dyre smykker ligger i pengeskabet.
translations.ja: 高価なアクセサリーは金庫にあります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; dative as the object of the preposition 'im' (static location).
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular present; predicate expressing location.
Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Schmuck'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Schmuck'; nominative masculine singular form with determiner.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject in the nominative case.
